mapper.select:
SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, CONCAT( COALESCE(r.patient_name, ''), '/', COALESCE(r.age, 0), '岁/', COALESCE(r.gender, '未知') ) AS patientInfo, r.inpatient_no AS hospitalNo, r.collection_time AS collectionTime, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.ai_conclusion, ''), '-') AS aiConclusion, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.doctor_diagnosis, ''), '-') AS doctorConclusion, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.audit_doctor_name, ''), '-') AS auditDoctorName, r.audit_time AS auditTime, CASE WHEN r.report_status IN (2, 3, 4) THEN '已审核' ELSE '待生成' END AS status FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
AND r.report_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.reportNo}, '%')
AND r.patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.patientName}, '%')
AND r.report_status IN (0, 1)
AND r.report_status IN (2, 3, 4)
ORDER BY COALESCE(r.audit_time, r.report_create_time, r.create_time) DESC, r.report_id DESC

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, r.record_id AS recordId, r.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId,
r.patient_id AS patientId, r.patient_name AS patientName, r.gender AS gender, r.age AS age, r.inpatient_no AS hospitalNo,
r.collection_time AS collectionTime,
r.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, r.doctor_diagnosis AS doctorConclusion, r.doctor_suggestion AS doctorSuggestion,
r.report_create_doctor_id AS reportCreateDoctorId, r.report_create_doctor_name AS reportCreateDoctorName, r.report_create_time AS reportCreateTime,
r.audit_doctor_id AS auditDoctorId, r.audit_doctor_name AS auditDoctorName, r.audit_time AS auditTime, r.audit_opinion AS auditOpinion,
r.report_status AS reportStatus, CASE WHEN r.report_status IN (2, 3, 4) THEN '已审核' ELSE '待生成' END AS status FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.report_id = #{reportId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
